artPrompt: An exuberant goblin cheerleader thrusting a clenched fist toward the viewer for a bump, mouth wide in a rallying cheer, pom-like tassels flying, a bonfire blazing behind in flame-orange; confetti and sparks swirl through the riotous square, torn blank bunting and overturned boxes hazing into ember-red and night-black smoke, the camaraderie rendered warm and a little wistful, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Fist-Bump Fanatic
text:
Whenever Fist-Bump Fanatic attacks, fist-bump the player to your left. If they fist-bump back, Fist-Bump Fanatic gets +2/+0 until end of turn from sheer camaraderie.
If they leave you hanging, Fist-Bump Fanatic gets -1/-0 and is, frankly, devastated. Look at it. Look what they did to it.
Finish the fist-bump with an explosion sound for an extra +1/+0. Yes, the sound is required.
flavorText: Pound it. POUND IT. ...okay, never mind.
